title: ALTER TABLE RENAME fails if the database encoding is not UTF8
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, value BLOB);
INSERT INTO test_table (name, value) VALUES ('valid_name', UNHEX('48656C6C6F'));
INSERT INTO new_test_table (name, value) VALUES (NULL, UNHEX('4E6F742054657874'));
SELECT * FROM new_test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: ALTER TABLE RENAME fails with non-UTF8 encoding
